# Credentials Setup

Create a file in this folder, for example:

- `env/credentials.txt`

Then paste values like:

```text
GITHUB_USERNAME=your-github-username
GITHUB_PAT=your-personal-access-token
REPO_OWNER=jwood1001
REPO_NAME=CKM
REPO_URL=https://github.com/jwood1001/CKM.git
```

Use a GitHub Personal Access Token that can push to the repo.

After you add the file, tell me the exact filename and I can use it to finish the push.
